name: Travis CI
description: Monitor Travis CI pipelines for automated build and deployment compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Travis CI at https://app.travis-ci.com
2. Click your profile icon → Settings
3. Copy your API Token
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Travis CI → Profile → API Token

checks.name: Code Changes
checks.description: Verifies Travis CI organizations are configured for automated build pipelines

checks.name: Separation of Environments
checks.description: Verifies Travis CI pipelines manage deployments across environments
